name: Auto Router
description: Composer auto-router control and policy settings for judge-based model routing.

autoRouter.enabledByDefault.description: Enable the auto router for new conversations by default.

autoRouter.policyText.default: Default to the selected coding model. Promote when the task appears stuck or validation fails repeatedly. Prefer the configured frontend/design model for UI design, layout, accessibility, and copy work.
autoRouter.policyText.description: Natural-language routing policy given to the routing judge.

autoRouter.judgeModel.description: Model used as the routing judge. Leave blank to use the app default.

autoRouter.judgeMaxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens for routing judge decisions.

autoRouter.routingWindowTurns.description: Assistant turns before the router settles for the conversation.

autoRouter.maxSwitches.description: Maximum accepted model switches during the routing window.

autoRouter.switchoverMode.description: How context should move when a recommendation is accepted.

autoRouter.toolContextMode.description: How tool calls are represented for the judge. This never uses an LLM summarizer.

autoRouter.toolHeadChars.description: Leading characters to keep from tool output when using head-tail context.

autoRouter.toolTailChars.description: Trailing characters to keep from tool output when using head-tail context.

autoRouter.requireApprovalForPromotion.description: Show a composer approval notice before accepting a promotion or provider switch.

autoRouter.frontendDesignModel.description: Preferred model for frontend design routing, for example claude-sonnet-openrouter.

autoRouter.promotedModel.description: Preferred stronger model when the current trajectory starts failing.
